text_block_list.text:
After a training briefing session, I hand Mihono
Bourbon a fan letter that arrived for her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I will read it now.

The letter gushes over Mihono Bourbon's running
and how inspiring the hard work she puts in is.

"Dear Bourbon... I'm going to work just as hard as
you do. And someday..."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: "I want to be strong, just like you." ...Like me?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Increased heart rate confirmed. Body
temperature rising rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: That's your heart telling you you're motivated.
That's your heart telling you you're motivated.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...This is not according to schedule, but
requesting permission to run.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I want to run in order to burn off this excess
energy.
choice_data_list: Of course! I'll go with you!
Of course! I'll go with you!

text_block_list.text:
And so, I end up going for a run with Mihono
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list: Let's not overdo it. Why don't we head home?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm accumulating fatigue as I run... but the
thermal energy in my chest continues to increase.

Though I harbor some concerns about her health,
I stay with the impassioned Mihono Bourbon right
up until curfew!
